pricing.cardDesc: A single plan: yours. All features, tailored to the size of your firm.

faq.title: Your questions, our answers
faq.subtitle: If yours isn't listed, write to us at support@imaro.ma.

q1.question: Is Imaro compliant with Decree 2.23.700 and Law 18-00?
q1.answer: Yes — fully. The 12 mandatory annexes can be generated as signed PDFs. The compliance calendar follows the annual cycle automatically. The audit log is kept for 7 years as required by article 12.

q2.question: How much does Imaro cost for my firm?
q2.answer: Pricing by tiers of managed units. Starter plan from 299 DH/month, Pro at 599 DH/month, Enterprise on quote. No setup fees, no annual commitment — no constraints.

q3.question: Is my data secure?
q3.answer: Strict multi-tenant: your firm is fully isolated. No other syndic can see your data. EU hosting with daily backups. The AI processes data via Claude (Anthropic) without storing it or using it to train the models.

q4.question: How long does migration from Excel take?
q4.answer: Less than 30 minutes for an average co-ownership. The import wizard accepts your existing Excel files, auto-maps the columns and validates each row before import. You keep all your history.

q5.question: Is the resident portal really used by owners?
q5.answer: Yes — average activation rate of 78% in our client firms. Login by WhatsApp OTP (no password to remember), mobile-first interface 16 px minimum. WhatsApp notifications keep the resident informed in real time.

q6.question: What if I speak Arabic?
q6.answer: The interface fully switches to Arabic with RTL (right-to-left) layout in one click. All modules are translated. The PDF annexes remain in French (the official language of the Moroccan administration).

rappels.appliesAll: Reminder settings apply to all your buildings
rappels.stageDescJ3: Gentle reminder sent to residents who have not paid yet.
rappels.stageDescJ2: Follow-up reminder for residents still pending.
rappels.stageDescJ1: Urgent reminder the day before the due date.
rappels.stageDescJourJ: Final reminder on the due date.
rappels.stageDescRetard: Daily reminders until the payment is received.
rappels.activeDesc: Reminders are active. Messages go out automatically according to the schedule.
rappels.langDesc: Each reminder is sent in the resident's preferred language.
rappels.recentSubtitle: History of reminders sent to residents
rappels.recentEmptyDesc: The reminder history will appear here.
rappels.howDailyDesc: Automatic reminders sent at {{hour}}:00 every day.
rappels.howOverdueDesc: Sent daily until the payment is received (max {{n}} days).
rappels.howLimitsDesc: {{max}} manual sends per day — unlimited automatic.

visites.title: Visits
visites.subtitle: Tracking visitors, couriers and providers via single-use QR code
visites.emptyDesc: Create a new visit to generate a QR code to send to the visitor.

form.title: New visit
form.desc: Generates a single-use QR code. The visitor receives a link to scan at the entrance.
form.purposePlaceholder: e.g. Family visit, Glovo delivery, plumber intervention
form.plannedAtHint: Leave empty for an immediate visit (walk-in)
form.recurringHint: Reusable QR — for a provider who comes back regularly (weekly cleaning, gardener, etc.)

detail.title: Visit detail
detail.qrHint: To be scanned by the guard at entry / exit
detail.waMessage: Hello {{name}}, your Imaro pass is ready: {{url}}

scan.title: Scan the QR
scan.desc: Place the visitor's QR in front of the camera or paste the token manually.
scan.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Enter the token manually.
scan.cameraNotSupported: Camera not available on this device.

aiChat.title: Imaro Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Law 18-00 · Decree 2.23.700
aiChat.welcome: Hello! I'm the Imaro assistant. I can answer your questions about co-ownership management, accounting and cite articles from **Law 18-00** and **Decree 2.23.700**.
aiChat.disclaimer: The AI does not replace professional legal advice.
aiChat.errorMsg: An error occurred. Please try again.

suggestions.s1: How to calculate late payment penalties?
suggestions.s2: Which annexes do I need to generate?
suggestions.s3: What is the legal notice period for a general meeting?
suggestions.s4: How do I close the accounting fiscal year?

team.title: Your team
team.intro: Do you manage your syndic alone, or would you like to add a manager to your team?
team.selfDesc: You'll be the only one accessing the space for now.
team.addDesc: Invite a collaborator with dedicated access.
team.name: Full name
team.hint: A temporary password will be sent to them; they'll change it on first sign-in.
team.required: Enter the manager's name and email.
team.credentialsHint: Share these credentials with the manager. They'll change their password on first sign-in.

residence.title: Your first building
residence.intro: Let's create the building you manage. You can add more afterwards.
residence.name: Building name
residence.required: Name, address and city are required.

lots.title: The building's units
lots.intro: Generate the units all at once. You can edit them individually later.
lots.advancedHint: Need wings, floors or phases? Configure them later on the building page.
lots.required: Indicate at least one unit to generate.

done.title: All set
done.heading: {{name}} is configured 🎉
done.body: {{count}} units created. Here are the next steps to complete your file:

next.copros: Add the owners and their units
next.budget: Set the budget and funds calls

checklist.title: Finish your setup
checklist.subtitle: A few steps to make your space fully operational.

visitorPass.title: Visitor pass
visitorPass.subtitle: Imaro · building access
visitorPass.showAtEntrance: Show this QR at the entrance
visitorPass.scanByGuardian: The guard scans it on your arrival and departure
visitorPass.expiresAfterScan: Single-use code — expires after the exit scan
visitorPass.notFoundDesc: This link is invalid, already used or expired.

gardien.title: Guard mode
gardien.subtitle: QR scan at entry · exit · walk-in
gardien.hint: Point the camera at the visitor's QR

reason.too_early: Too early — outside the planned arrival window

scanner.permissionDesc: Imaro needs camera access to scan QR codes.
scanner.noCamera: No camera detected on this device.

walkIn.title: Visitor walk-in
walkIn.desc: Register a visitor immediately without a pre-generated QR.

guard.notLoggedIn: Sign in to access guard mode
guard.wrongRole: Your account does not have the guard role. Contact the manager.

photo.title: Visitor photo
photo.desc: Capture a photo for the security audit (recommended).

install.title: Install Imaro Guard
install.desc: Add to home screen for quick offline access.

errors.title: Something went wrong
